description: A professional template anchored in Stanford cardinal red. Balances warmth and authority — suited to academic presentations, institutional reports, and leadership communications.

visual_style.color_weight: light backgrounds with bold red accents
visual_style.imagery_style: photography or clean icons; avoid cartoons

avoid_for: Tech startup pitch decks needing dark/minimal aesthetic
Heavy data visualization decks (use Castro instead)

font_requirements.note: Source Sans 3 must be installed for exact rendering. Roboto is the safe fallback.

asset_placeholders.logo: Top-left logo, max 160×60px. Prefer color version on light slides.
asset_placeholders.logo_light: White/inverted logo for dark and red masters.
asset_placeholders.hero_image: Full-bleed or half-bleed photography. Minimum 1920×1080px recommended.
